basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Project Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Delhi Project Scientist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./ M.Sc./ M.C.A./Post Graduate in relevant discipline having 1st class or equivalent in the appropriate discipline.
qualification.details: B.Tech./ M.Sc./ M.C.A./Post Graduate in relevant discipline having 1st class or equivalent in the appropriate discipline.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Project Scientist Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Project Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Delhi Project Scientist position is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Scientist position at the Indian Institute of Technology Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech., M.Sc., M.C.A., or Post Graduate degree in a relevant discipline with a first-class or equivalent grade in the appropriate discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 47,790 to Rs. 62,350, plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application with all required documents to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Delhi Project Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Scientist role will primarily involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job offered for the Project Scientist post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
